name: skillranger
description: SkillRanger is a local-first router and package manager for AI agent skills.

scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run check && npm test && npm run validate:registry && npm run lint:skills && npm run audit:registry && npm run eval:frontend -- --run-routing --project fixtures/next-react-ts --json && npm run eval:frontend:ru
scripts.check: node --check src/cli/index.ts && node --check src/paths.ts && node --check src/evals/frontend.ts && node --check src/mcp/server.ts && node --check src/mcp/protocol.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/types.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/utils.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/project.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/registry.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/install.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/domains.ts && node --check src/mcp/tools/visual.ts && node --check src/cli/visual-eval.ts && node --check src/evals/process.ts && node --check src/evals/visual/types.ts && node --check src/evals/visual/suite.ts && node --check src/evals/visual/runner.ts && node --check src/evals/visual/review.ts && node --check src/evals/visual/metrics.ts && node --check src/evals/visual/calibration.ts
